preamble: Shift of labiodental fricative [f] to bilabial fricative [ɸ], often as part of bilabialization in dialectal variations or loanword adaptation.

languageExamples.note: Loanword adaptation or dialectal variation involving bilabial fricatives.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
